goal: Recover stuck running/ missions — move back to pending or done so wire-go can drain
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/data/cursor_missions/running && for f in *.json; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; id="${f%.json}"; if [ -f ../done/${id}.json ]; then rm -f "$f"; else mv "$f" ../pending/recover-${f}; fi; done
